items.title: Genius Heiress Strikes Back
items.author: xiguachuangxiang
items.abstract: Jane Carter, brilliant but betrayed by sister Lily, is wrongly sent to a mental institution by her family. After three years, she returns stronger but scarred, relying on her cat and studies. When mistreated again, she fights back—exposing Lily's lies and her own genius at the Valedictorian Gala, leaving her family behind.

items.title: How to Train a Bad Boy
items.author: gangganghao
items.abstract: Diana Reed, a renowned dog trainer, is hired by Mrs. Lane to tame her rebellious son, Edward Lane Jr.—only to find he's a grown man with a troubled mind. Using her methods, Diana helps Ed Jr. regain control, sparks fly, but jealous Sophia Grant forces her departure. Three years later, Diana returns; Ed Jr. still waits.

items.title: Four Uncles Spoil Me
items.author: mangzhong
items.abstract: Following her mother's funeral and a betrayal, Mara Cook discovers she can understand animals. Adopted by billionaire Julian Ford, she uses this gift to aid the family through crises, winning over her disabled uncle Sean and becoming their most cherished member.

items.title: Love Frequency at 30000 Feet
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Air traffic controller Grace has secretly loved elite pilot Liam for a decade, her admiration hidden behind the radar screens of the control tower. A fateful blind date unexpectedly reunites them, igniting an impulsive decision to marry. Their whirlwind union begins as a marriage of convenience but soon navigates turbulent skies.

items.title: Lucky Jinx Girl
items.author: jingyue
items.abstract: Despite being seen as a jinx for her accurate prophecies, Bella, blessed with good luck, meets the Governor's lost wife, Yana, while foraging. Yana takes her home, and since then, Bella has flawlessly averted a string of bad luck.

items.title: Wrong Bride Right Love
items.author: xingningwenhua
items.abstract: Charlotte Rivers, a noble heiress tormented by her stepmother, is mistakenly wed to Jackson Grant, a rugged general of humble origins. Despite clashes and mismatched worlds, they navigate misunderstandings and trials, gradually earning respect and affection, ultimately building a loving, harmonious life together.

items.title: Find Love in the Stone Age
items.author: yinghuoyuedong
items.abstract: Lilah, a modern botanist, wakes up in the Stone Age and nearly becomes a tiger's food! Luckily, Derek, the fierce chief of Oracle Clan, saved her and claimed her as his woman. She’s pampered, protected, and ready to build a thriving tribe with her wild mate… until danger stirs beyond the jungle.

items.title: My Secretly Wealthy Fiance
items.author: tianqiao
items.abstract: Chloe Scott, a delivery worker grieving her mother's death, helps billionaire Mr. Freeman by chance. She marries his grandson, Nathan Freeman, for $200,000 to settle medical debts. Misunderstandings arise due to their divergent backgrounds, leading to comedic challenges amid growing affection.

items.title: From Trash Dad to Treasure
items.author: yinghuokuaichuang
items.abstract: Princess Lexi woke up in the modern world as a starving girl who had been swapped at birth, unloved, and left to die. Furious, she left behind the man who had never cared for her and made the town's biggest loser her new dad. She was ready to turn trash into treasure.

items.title: The Missing Floor
items.author: dalianmaoyulanpishu
items.abstract: Given a second chance, Margaret finds herself back on the very day April first imposed strict rules on the family. She vows to stop being patient and strikes back hard at April and ungrateful son, teaching them a brutal lesson.

items.title: My Golden-Eyed Daughter
items.author: yueyiduanju
items.abstract: Six-year-old Lily gains clairvoyance. To ease her father, deliveryman Jack Forrest’s burden, she enters the antique world, scoring bargains from street stalls to auctions. With Grandpa Joe and Grace Summers, she exposes Richard Banks’s plots, defends justice, and brings her dad love, financial freedom, and a complete family.

items.title: In Exile, We Bloomed
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Secret agent Isabella transmigrated into a concubine’s daughter and was forced to marry a crippled prince named Jacob. In exile, with her wits and a mysterious space, she faced hardships, overcame danger, deepened her bond with Jacob, and built a new life far from home.

items.title: Love You to the Bone
items.author: mengxiaoK
items.abstract: She was his father's adopted daughter, forbidden and desired. Silas loved Eliana with an intensity that scared them both. When she finally escaped, he was left with nothing but regret. Four years later, she's back—and he's determined to win her heart the right way.

items.title: First Love Reunited
items.author: gangganghao
items.abstract: When Julia Carter returns to school to handle her brother's romance, she's stunned to see her high school first love, Alex Bennett, as the teacher. Seven years ago, she broke up by pretending to love her childhood friend, Dr. Nathan Cooper. Reconnecting, old feelings and misunderstandings threaten their chance at lost love.

items.title: Love by Mistake
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After a wedding night mix-up, Sophie Lane and Charles Foster become a couple, turning conflicts into love. Claire Lane and Alex Foster grow close through misunderstandings. The two couples face challenges together, understand their true feelings, and finally find happiness.

items.title: Fall in Love with My Crush
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After retaking exams for a year, Sophie finally enrolls at the same university as Jason—her six-year secret crush. Mistaking the aloof rich heir's solitude for being taken, she keeps silent until the truth-or-dare night sparks unexpected closeness, and she finally learns he has been in love with her as well.

items.title: Billionaire’s Hidden Love
items.author: caiyuangungun
items.abstract: Claire, a rich heiress, picks Nathan at a club to bear a baby and reclaim her mom’s firm without knowing that he’s River City’s billionaire, who suffers from amnesia and once loved her deeply. As he regains his memory, they grow close. With his hidden love and help, they win back the company and welcome triplets.

items.title: Before I Lose You Again
items.author: nanze
items.abstract: Gina and Ryan shared dreams and sacrifices. When diagnosed with systemic lupus, she crushed his proposal to spare him. When Ryan returned with his fiancée and eSports team, intersecting with Gina's struggling life, she ended her life. He learned the truth and woke up ten years ago, fighting tirelessly to rewrite their fate.

items.title: Never too late to love you
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Lily Lucas, the only cherished daughter of the Lucas family, faces a tragedy when her family is brutally murdered when she is 15. She is then held captive by Tim Brown for five years, enduring abuse and mistreatment. Tim schemes to have Lily seduce Wade Brown, hoping to expel him from the family. At first, Lily only sees Wade as a means to an end, but eventually, she realizes that she has fallen in love with him.

items.title: The Hidden First Love
items.author: douduyanqing
items.abstract: Poisoned by her adopted heirs but given a second chance at life, Marquise Crystal Johnson weaponizes illegitimate heirs to dismantle her former household. CEO Simon sees through her disguise and makes her work as a cleaner, only to find she's his long-lost love. But when Claire discovers her family's ruin is tied to his, their love faces a cruel test.

items.title: Too Late to Love Him
items.author: tiandoubaojuchang
items.abstract: Alexander loved Sophie in secret while her heart belonged to her sister's fiancé. It's a forced marriage, a tragic accident, and a desperate deal. She ran from him until the day he stopped chasing. And that's when she saw the truth that she had loved him all along.

items.title: Love After Quick Matrimony
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Chase, a well-known playboy, suddenly agreed to a marriage that the elite circle looked down upon. The elite were all shocked. One day, Chase, drunk, cornered Yvonne against the wall and, blushing and furious, exclaimed, "I've liked you for sixteen years! Can't you see that?"

items.title: Unexpected Love with My Boss
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Irene works at a nightclub to fulfill her late mother's wishes. An unexpected encounter with Julian Chilton changes her life. She joins a renowned company only to find Julian is her boss. Things take a surprising turn when she discovers she's pregnant, a secret Julian soon uncovers.

items.title: The Imprisoned Love
items.author: qishuyouyu
items.abstract: Chelsea was auctioned off like an object, but Jerome rescued her and discovered her true identity. He made Chelsea stay by his side and seek redemption for her father's sins. Yolanda set Chelsea up, leading to Jerome punishing her and donating her kneecap bones. However, when a teacher in an art studio drugged Chelsea and attempted to assault her, Jerome arrived just in time to save her.

items.title: The Billionaire's Dramatic Love Grovel
items.author: douduyanqing
items.abstract: Vincent had a three - year celibate marriage of convenience, secretly protecting Lucy. But he was misjudged as controlling. When suitors chased Lucy and she filed for divorce, Vincent lost his temper. Finding her pregnancy test, he confronted her. At an alumni event, he passionately kissed her in front of jealous suitors, showing he didn't want to let go.

items.title: Sworn Enemies in Love
items.author: enbisheng
items.abstract: Lifelong rivals Cherry and Samuel accidentally fall for each other after a one-night stand. Their feuding mothers, Remi and Skylar, once love-hate friends, unknowingly push them closer, leading to chaos, comedy, and unexpected love amidst family drama and old grudges.

items.title: Love Began with a Drink
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After her mother died, Lucy Lance lived with her father's new family—but couldn’t stand him and ran away. One drunken night, she stumbled into the wrong room at a banquet and became Ethan Sterling's "antidote." From then on, the man once allergic to women couldn’t stop clinging to her, spoiling her endlessly.

items.title: Intense Love_ Marrying an Empire Tycoon
items.author: rongliang
items.abstract: After catching her unfaithful boyfriend in the act, Yvonne swiftly moved on and entered into a flash marriage with Henry. However, misunderstandings regarding Henry's stepfather caused Yvonne to separate from him. Yet, as time passed, Yvonne gradually discovered that Henry had a thing for her from the very beginning. Through a series of complicated events and emotional turmoil, Yvonne and Henry found their way back to each other.

items.title: Bound by Debt, Destined for Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: To pay off her family's debts, Keyla Cline secretly married Davon Wells. When she got her dream job, she found Lisa Kinston, her archenemy, was her subordinate! After handling Lisa, Keyla faced another hurdle when her high school classmate impersonated her. Ultimately, she overcame all challenges and found happiness with Davon.

items.title: Her Burning Secret Love
items.author: beijingkasite
items.abstract: After secretly loving Samuel Blake for a decade, Charlotte Sutton finally marries him, only to be misunderstood and rejected due to Lily White's scheming. Stricken with late-stage cancer, her world collapses. Three years later, she returns with amnesia and Henry King, forcing Samuel to win her back.

items.title: Love's Perfect Landing
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Ace pilot Isabella Kaur hits career and personal lows when new CEO Javier Morgan arrives, sparking unexpected chemistry. He is smitten with her, and she discovers that he resembles her captain idol. Later, she becomes his copilot, and through flying missions together, their relationship blossomed.

items.title: Falling into the River of Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Reclaimed by her birth family, she faces favoritism, betrayal, and shattered vows. Breaking free, she finds herself caught between the man who protects her with ruthless devotion and the lines between sister and lover—adrift in a river of love and conflict. Will she drown or rise again?

items.title: Love Hidden in Time
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Zora Marlow's fiancé, Yates Shimton, saved Quita Chadwick during a car crash, leaving Zora behind. Rescued by Yates's uncle, Stephen Shimton, Zora lost her memory and mistook him for her husband, proposing to him. This time, Stephen vowed to protect her.

items.title: Forced to Love the Ruthless CEO
items.author: FlexTV
items.abstract: To cover the medical expenses for her mother's surgery, college student Nina sells her first sexual experience at a hefty price to a stranger named Ian. Shortly after, her mother's condition deteriorates, and she urgently needs an artificial kidney transplant. Evan, a suitor of Nina's, takes her to seek help from his uncle. Nina is shocked to discover that the uncle is none other than Ian, the man from that fateful night. In a panic, she attempts to run away, but Evan drags her back to Ian, revealing that only Ian's research conglomerate has the artificial kidney her mother needs. Biting back her pride, Nina pleads for Ian's assistance. However, Ian sets harsh conditions for the deal, determined to pull her back into the madness of that night...

items.title: The Love He Never Spoke of
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: When Sophie's missing fiancé returns with amnesia and a new wife, she marries his younger brother, Ryan. What starts as an act of defiance becomes a dream come true for Ryan, who has secretly loved Sophie for years. As they grow closer, she slowly falls for him, only to uncover a love that was hidden all along.

items.title: Don't Hold Back
items.author: guangzhiying
items.abstract: A year ago, Wendy swapped identities with her twin sister to marry into the Knights, covering her dad's medical bills, and played her role flawlessly. When her sister returned, demanding to switch back, Wendy stepped aside, heartbroken. The usually cold, indifferent husband noticed the change and went wild trying to find Wendy.

items.title: Second Chance with My True Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Susie Davi in her previous life was manipulated by her ex-boyfriend Michael Smith and his step-sister Susan, leading to her demise. It was only as she faced death that she realized how deeply her husband Ryan Liam loved her. Upon being reborn, she spared no effort to win him back. However, Susan, intent on preventing their reunion, schemed and plotted to drive them apart. Susie remained vigilant, evaded these traps, and grew closer to Ryan emotionally, ultimately sealing their bond.

items.title: Eight Years Later, We Meet Again
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Natalie Carter's world crumbled overnight when her parents passed away, and she went abroad. When she came home years later, Jason Lloyd emerged, not just her bestie's brother anymore, but a steadfast shadow refusing to leave her side, his gaze burning so intensely it threatened to dissolve her resolve.

items.title: Love Until the End
items.author: dalianmaoyulanpishu
items.abstract: With only a month left, Charlotte Lynn hires a funeral director online and unexpectedly reunites with ex-boyfriend Ryan Foster. As old wounds and secrets surface, Ryan learns the truth of their breakup. Unable to cope with Charlotte's impending death, he spirals into madness and ultimately follows her into the unknown.

items.title: Captive Emotions, A Love Triangle
items.author: caiyuangungun
items.abstract: To take revenge on her unfaithful fiancé—Micah, Camila teams up with Hudson, the Harward family's head, who helps her replace Micah and protects her during a kidnapping. As her true identity emerges, their bond deepens, but Hudson's second personality, King, complicates matters...

items.title: Finding True Affection in Love's Maze
items.author: Fuzhouchangdu
items.abstract: Jessica, married into the Carter family for three years, never met her husband because he loved someone else. Over these three years, he sought medical help everywhere for his beloved while Jessica always waited for him to change his mind. But all she got was divorce papers. Later, she concealed her identity as his wife and became his therapist. Through repeated interactions, she learned of his true feelings for her.

items.title: Timeless Love
items.author: Playlet
items.abstract: Chole was the ancient Queen and a time travel brought her to 2024. In this modern world, the General she loved becomes her contract husband and she accidentally got a chance to audition. Now a Hollywood movie star is about to shine.

items.title: Love Tactics
items.author: yuewen
items.abstract: Nathan Grant and Isabelle Lane secretly love each other, yet family troubles force Nathan to propose a marriage alliance. Unknown to him, Isabelle has secretly borne his child five years prior. Their hidden truths unravel when their son suddenly finds Nathan, sparking a heartfelt reunion and the start of a new chapter.

items.title: Devil's Lullaby
items.author: huace
items.abstract: Scarlett, a whimsical girl battling ALS, ignites a dangerous game with Lucien, "The Ice King", to fulfill her late mother's final wish. Armed with surgical precision, Lucien exploits every vulnerability to cage his prey. But as cornered rabbits bite back, the girl's fiery defiance begins melting her captor's glacial heart.

items.title: Blind to Love
items.author: zhangbangduanju
items.abstract: Hannah Jiang, a wealthy heiress, fell for poor scholar Vincent Shaw—until she caught him with her stepsister. Heartbroken, she fled abroad. Six years later, she returns as a successful woman, only to witness Vincent’s engagement without knowing he still loves her. Then they gradually resolve their misunderstandings.

items.title: Hurt Me,Love Me
items.author: DramaBox
items.abstract: Even though Katherine and Eric got married, Eric was still entangled with Riley, which caused Katherine great suffering. Despite her pain, Katherine endured it out of guilt and deep love. Unexpectedly, she became pregnant again, but Eric continued to neglect and hurt her. For the sake of their lost child, Katherine decided to divorce.

items.title: Tamed by Love
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: Scarlett Windsor, heiress of the Windsor Group, is betrayed by her sister and fiancé—left for dead, her memory shattered, and her spirit broken. By chance, she is rescued by Shane Fontaine. After an attack jolts her back to reality, she regains her strength and sharpens her mind. Now, she is ready for vengeance.

items.title: Mute Husband, My Love Amplifier
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Lucy Swain, a villainess in a romance novel, marries mute Marvin Seal yet belittles him. Envying the heroine, she commits misdeeds and suffers humiliation. Awakening, she woos Marvin through heartfelt talks. Amid clashes, their bond deepens into love. Overcoming adversaries, they confess their feelings and embrace bliss.

items.title: The Ross Affair—Love Unmasked
items.author: jingyue
items.abstract: Claire never imagined one night with Julian Ross—her boyfriend Alec’s powerful father—would alter her life’s course. Heartbroken by Alec’s betrayal with her best friend, she impulsively married Julian… only to discover unexpected happiness as he cherished her beyond measure, gifting a life of luxury and devotion she’d never dared to dream of.

items.title: Grant me a lifetime of love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Yona Levin's dying, her boyfriend signed a contract with the Grim Reaper to trade in his life for her, with the condition that he would forget about her. When he fell in love with Yona again, it was the death of his boyfriend. Five years later, Yona appeared at the Chavez's banquet with her two children. At the moment when her boyfriend recovered his memory, the mistress stabbed Yona with a knife...

items.title: The Love Remains
items.author: yuewen
items.abstract: Betrayed by her boyfriend, Emily Anderson enters a contract marriage with William Sterling, her brother's powerful friend. When she tries to flee, William returns her—revealing she once saved his life. As her ex pursues her and her stepsister schemes, Emily fights back, turning the tables and finding love.

items.title: Love in Twilight
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Eleanor unexpectedly gets pregnant after an encounter with Philip. They conceal their marriage at the company, yet misunderstandings multiply. She gradually discovers his love and care, letting her guard down. Helping each other through turmoil, they resolve conflicts and embrace newfound happiness, embarking on a new journey.

items.title: Love Above the Clouds
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Ava Lynn, a dedicated aircraft maintenance engineer at SkyNation Airlines, secretly marries Captain Ethan Quinn. What began as a marriage of convenience soon blossoms into genuine warmth, as Ethan’s presence brings new meaning to Ava’s demanding routine.

items.title: The Long-Planned Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: A ruthless landlord leaves Celia homeless—until she runs into Leon, her icy ex-instructor from years ago. Desperate for a place to stay, she agrees to his sudden marriage offer. What starts as a deal soon reveals Leon’s secret: he’s been waiting for her all along.

items.title: All Bets on Love
items.author: huace
items.abstract: Framed by her adoptive sister Snow, Nina lost everything after a night with gambling king Ethan. Six years later, she returned disguised as dealer Shela, intent on seducing him and destroying Snow, now his wife. But as the truth emerged, their game of revenge twisted into something deeper.

items.title: Secret Love at 30,000 Feet
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: It tells the story of airline captain Tyler Levine and air traffic controller Leila Moore who got married before their love blooms. Leila once had a crush on Tyler, and even though people doubted their relationship because of their different status, they ended up catching feelings for each other while juggling work and personal drama, finally getting their happily ever after.

items.title: Accidentally in Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Amidst a series of astonishing misunderstandings, Anna finds herself at the wrong hotel for a blind date, only to encounter the right partner by sheer chance. Is this fate a cunning web of political intrigue or merely a serendipitous misadventure? As their interactions unfold, Anna gradually realizes that she's falling for this unexpected companion. However, just as their paths seem to align harmoniously, the undercurrents of a brewing love triangle begin to stir, signaling that the true complexities of their entangled fates are yet to unravel.

items.title: Goodbye, Unrequited Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Jennifer Davis dreamed of her past life, where Jeremy Kimbrell, the boy she'd loved for seven years, left her for his crush. At her lowest point, it was Quincy Coffey, her childhood friend, who was there for her. Upon waking, Jennifer let go of her unrequited feelings for Jeremy and turned her attention to Quincy, her true love.

items.title: Love Never Fades Away
items.author: douduyanqing
items.abstract: Taken in by the Johnsons, Sarah fell for her older "brother," Ethan. Blaming her for his mother's death, Ethan fled abroad after her confession. Three years later, he returns to find Sarah distant and ready to leave. As old emotions rekindle, a dark family secret threatens everything.

items.title: Love Wins Over Curse
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: 20-year-old Shane Johnson's accidental pregnancy with Noah Brown - her best friend's cursed uncle - becomes their salvation when he rescues her from abuse, forging an unlikely love that breaks his family's deadly curse.

items.title: Love Through the Veil of Time
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Caroline marries into the household of Richard Sterling, the Military Governor, to save her father. She faces challenges from two scheming concubines and external threats, yet handles them with grace. As her bond with Richard deepens, they join forces to weather all storms together, committed to a lifetime of shared trials and love.

items.title: Let Me Go, Mr. Ford
items.author: jingyue
items.abstract: Lila loved Ethan until discovering his secret marriage to Sophie. After she left heartbroken, Ethan sought her forgiveness—only to learn she'd died in a crash the night he betrayed her. Reborn, Lila traded her shattered heart for a cold, new life.

items.title: Love Under Contract
items.author: bingtian
items.abstract: A small-town girl. A cold-hearted CEO. One unexpected pregnancy. What starts as a contract marriage soon spirals into a whirlwind of secrets, jealousy, and a shocking truth that could change everything. Will love conquer all, or will their deal end in heartbreak?

items.title: Rosy Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Elnora loved Shawn since childhood. She stood in for his girlfriend, Yvonne. When Yvonne recovered, Elnora was dumped. A blessing followed as Channing Sherman won her heart. Elnora found true love with Channing while Shawn regretted his mistake too late.

items.title: Billionaire Surgeon's Innocent Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Emily, in desperate need of money, responds to a surrogacy ad and meets wealthy surgeon Thomas, who mistakes her for a gold-digger. After a passionate night, Thomas becomes infatuated, and she becomes his kept woman. Despite developing feelings, Emily knows their relationship is transactional and decides to walk away. However, their shared experiences linger in her heart. With Chris's help, Emily and Thomas eventually find their way back to each other.

items.title: Mr. Shawn, Your Love Is Too Good for Me
items.author: bikan
items.abstract: Aria Sanders, the second daughter of the Sanders family, suffers a drastic change in her life. Her sister interfered with her marriage. Her husband, the president of Shawn's Group, has broken her heart. She even suffers a miscarriage under persecution. Luckily, an old college friend is there to help. How should Aria deal with these crises? Who exactly is her husband's true love? Who is being true to her, and who is lying to her? Everything seems to be more than it appears...

items.title: When Fate Brings True Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After a fateful misunderstanding, orphan Annabelle White is forced to marry into the wealthy Howard family and secretly investigate a traitor. Unaware of the truth, Colin Howard resents her and tries to push her away, but as their marriage unravels, he discovers that Annabelle has always held a special place in his heart.

items.title: Tell Me You Love Me
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Joyce, the capital's most elegant socialite, enters a marriage of convenience with ruthless CEO Justin. He sees her as just another dull trophy wife—until she shocks him by demanding a divorce. Suddenly, the boring girl he ignored reveals hidden depths, forcing Justin to question everything he thought he knew about love.

items.title: I Will Find You, Girl
items.author: mangzhong
items.abstract: Five years ago, Lawson Malone lost his sight in a tragic brake failure accident. For five years, Renaa Massey stayed by his side, caring for him with unwavering devotion. But just as Lawson was on the verge of recovery, Renaa disappeared without a word... Now, five years later, Lawson returns to the city to take over the family business and search for the girl from his past. However, things are not as simple as they seem...

items.title: Love Beyond the Facade
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Unexpectedly transmigrating into a short drama, she became Jasmine Miller, an arrogant and domineering socialite in the capital city, and slept with a powerful figure hiding his true identity. While enjoying a luxurious life, she fought against her enemies with wits and courage, ultimately gaining love and personal growth.

items.title: Love After Revenge
items.author: youhe
items.abstract: Ethan Bennett's mother, Victoria, once manipulated Emily Summers to break his heart and derail his dreams. Years later, Ethan, now CEO, forces Emily into marriage for revenge. As old feelings flare and secrets surface—including Victoria's role—Ethan uncovers the truth and seeks justice, confronting his mother.

items.title: Folded Lies
items.author: judianduanju
items.abstract: Yvette impulsively marries Jaden, only to discover their fairytale romance is a calculated deception. As shattered truths surface, her perfect-wife facade crumbles—but Jaden's deepening obsession traps them both.

items.title: She'll Only Love You for 99 Days
items.author: mangzhong
items.abstract: Ethel saved Joshua Charles without him realizing her identity, leading to a 99-day contractual marriage to learn the Charles family's secrets. Facing resistance from both parties, their union unfolds with deceit, Cheryl's machinations, and Irene’s vendetta. Amidst chaos and a kidnapping plot gone awry, Ethel’s medical prowess saves Joshua's sister Faye. Ultimately, their divorce marks a new beginning, where love transcends contractual bounds.

items.title: Frozen Promises
items.author: guoerchuanmei
items.abstract: On her engagement eve, Cindy Lynn escapes her fiancé's betrayal and family's ruthless plot. A collision with Kevin Fisher - Hyson City's most dangerous tycoon - leaves her pregnant. When he acquires her hotel workplace, power games and forbidden attraction erupt. Cindy claws her way up through grit, yet unravels under Kevin's incendiary pursuit.

items.title: (English-dubbed)Love's Second Chance
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: In the years of her marriage to Owen Gray, Maya, the heiress of the Powell family, endures years of emotional abuse. Owen ignores the mistreatment she suffers from those around him, causing Maya to be bullied. In this lifetime, Maya is determined to leave this man and reclaim the dignity of being Ms. Powell!

items.title: Riding into Love
items.author: 番茄
items.abstract: Renegade biker Lyon falls in love on the first sight with Kat, a beautiful yet fragile young girl who lands a new job at Lyon's bike shop. As they fall in love, old wounds resurface when Lyon’s pursuer, unwittingly brings danger closer. Bound by love, Lyon and Kat decide to ride on towards a path of confrontation and salvation.

items.title: Love Frequency at 30000 Feet
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Air traffic controller Grace has secretly loved elite pilot Liam for a decade, her admiration hidden behind the radar screens of the control tower. A fateful blind date unexpectedly reunites them, igniting an impulsive decision to marry. Their whirlwind union begins as a marriage of convenience but soon navigates turbulent skies.

items.title: On the Bumpy Road to Love
items.author: zhongwen
items.abstract: To save her family, Tiana Cruz was forced to lie to her boyfriend Bryce Nash, who therefore believed she was a gold digger and left him for a rich man. What she didn't know was Bryce was the only heir to the Nash family, the richest in town. What he didn't know was the cure for his unmentionable disease was her... Fate was cruel, but as it turned out, she was his cure, his meant-to-be, and his one and only.

items.title: Love on the Sidelines
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Natalie had it all—engaged to football star Karl and carrying his child—until tragedy tore them apart. Seven years later, she returns, forcing Karl to confront the past, the child he never knew, and the woman he’s never stopped loving.

items.title: An Unexpected Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After 8 years of pursuing Eric Baker, Alice Young was abandoned on their wedding day. Luke Evans swept in to propose to her, and they quickly got married. As Luke helped the Youngs through their crisis, he faced trials together with Alice, often clashing with Eric. Finally, Luke won her heart, and they lived happily ever after.

items.title: Forced Marriage to My Fated Love
items.author: zhongwen
items.abstract: To cover her mother's medical bills, Phoebe Joyce reluctantly agreed to marry the comatose Keon Penley in her half-sister Camila's stead. Unexpectedly, he was the guy she had fallen for at first sight! When Phoebe was kidnapped, Keon came around just in time to rescue her. He then proposed a one-year contract marriage, during which he hurt her repeatedly due to Camila's schemes. When their deal was up, Phoebe insisted on leaving. Yet, he wouldn't let her go...

items.title: Final Call for Love
items.author: 番茄
items.abstract: June's decade-long love for Adrian led to a rushed marriage and a surprise pregnancy. Their joy shattered when Adrian's ex returned. Heartbroken, June left, and Adrian realized too late what he had lost.

items.title: Flash Marriage, Sweet Love
items.author: heiyan
items.abstract: When drunk, Tess Stone had a one-night stand with her boss Mr. Henry Felix. They then got married with an agreement. Gradually, he got along with Tess and defended her at work. His mother always objected, though. She wanted her son to marry a rich girl instead. Soon, Tess was pregnant. But she misunderstood that Henry married her only because she looked like his ex-girlfriend who passed away. So, Tess faked her death, ran away from home, and gave birth to twins. Henry didn't believe she was dead and finally found her.

items.title: Hidden Flame of Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Jasmine Scott returns to the Capital City for an internship, helping Wesley Jenkins pursue Miranda Jacobs. During this, Wesley falls for Jasmine, realizing the girl who saved him years ago was not Miranda but Jasmine. Filled with regret, he discovers the girl who loved him silently for seven years is now disheartened by his repeated hurts, unable to return to the past.

items.title: Hate The Way I Love You
items.author: MoboReels
items.abstract: Lillian and Jonathan are once a loving couple,believing they will be happy forever.However,a sudden illness shatters Lillian's dream life. To avoid being a burden to Jonathan, she heartbreakingly orchestrates an affair. Little did she know, Jonathan is the heir to a powerful family and grows to despise Lillian completely.. A year later, Jonathan returns as a CEO with his new fiancee, Ashley, repeatedly hurting Lillian. As Jonathan wrestles with his emotions, he discovers that Lillian is terminally ill at the time of their break up.  Can their love be rekindled,and will they find their way back to each other?

items.title: Faking Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: A famous actress and a wealthy heir enter a marriage of convenience as part of a wager, aiming to make each other fall in love within three months. As old misunderstandings and hidden sacrifices come to light, rivals threaten to tear them apart. Through trials and revelations, their fake marriage blossoms into genuine love.

items.title: Love Sent by Mistake
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Charles Goodwin accidentally sends a love confession to his boss, Serena Quinn, sparking an unexpected romance. From a mistaken message, Charles grows from a carefree heir to a devoted partner, while Serena reveals her softer side. Together, they face work challenges and personal growth, turning a playful act into true love.

items.title: Fated to Love You Anyway
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Whitney, a modern jeweler, wakes in the 1980s as a young woman with a job at the post office. A mistaken blind date with army major Terrell Laurent leads to a twist of fate marriage. Despite the mix-up, their story unfolds into a heartwarming tale of love and career revival in a new life.

items.title: Eleventh Spring of Secret Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Emily fell for a boy who played the drums—a crush that lingered unspoken. By chance, he stumbled into her flower shop on a stormy day. She handed him an umbrella and more flowers, determined to bury her longing. But on their day of reconnection two years later, they got married, marking the eleventh spring of her secret love.

items.title: Contracted Love The Swift Nuptials of Mr. Foster
items.author: rongliang
items.abstract: Megan worked multiple jobs to afford her grandmother's medical expenses. One day, she was asked to help disrupt a matchmaking event, where she encountered a man named Alex. Determined to break free from his controlling uncle's influence over his marriage, Alex chose to enter into a flash marriage with Megan, and the two became contractually bound as husband and wife.

items.title: Billionaire's Baby Trap
items.author: yuemeng
items.abstract: Dumped and drunk, Lynn has a one-night stand and gets pregnant. The stranger? Billionaire CEO Joseph Chambers. He proposes, but she discovers he's her rival's dad! Should she marry him for revenge, or run from the truth?

items.title: A Night to Remember, Love Awaits
items.author: xinyu
items.abstract: Sophia mistakes Joshua, a recently discharged soldier, for a male model, leading to an unforgettable night. Captivated by her charm, Joshua passionately pursues her. Known for her casual relationships, the Pembridge heiress gradually finds her heart drawn to him. Their journey ultimately unfolds into a blissful union.

items.title: A Fragile Love's Sacrifice
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Charlotte gradually fell for her husband, Sterling, but mounting pressures worsened her fragile mental health, causing errors and chaos. Knowing the truth, she chose divorce, unwilling to burden him. Near death, her lost memories unexpectedly returned, revealing past truths.

items.title: Love for a Muted Rose
items.author: yuewen
items.abstract: After losing her voice in a car accident, Charlotte Winslow is betrayed by the man she loved, who stages a fake divorce to please another woman. When the Foster Group’s Heir, Edward Foster returns to propose, she chooses dignity and love—leaving her ex drowning in regret.

items.title: Love in Full Bloom
items.author: caiyuangungun
items.abstract: A young romance turned tragic when Alex was diagnosed with brain cancer. To save him, Evelyn left alone bearing their child, Mia. Five years on, Lane fell ill and slipped into a vegetative state. Mia plays violin on the streets. Now the richest man in Capital City, Alex comes home to look for Evelyn and they finally meet again.

items.title: I'm the King's First Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Having lived two lifetimes, Eulalie couldn't alter her family's tragic downfall. In her third life, aided by a system, she enlisted Seraphina's help. Together, they schemed from birth. Seraphina, seizing power, avenged Eulalie and became Queen, winning the King's heart in the palace intrigue.

items.title: Love You Once More
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Chelsey Shaw time-travels six years ahead, finding her 24-year-old self's infidelity alienating husband Henry Jones and traumatizing daughter Josie. Seeking redemption, she reconnects with Henry, healing Josie. As harmony blossoms, they defy constraints, unveiling an enemy's plot and protecting their true selves.

items.title: Drunk in Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After a drunken encounter with her rival Oscar Page goes viral, Ginny Lane faces family pressure to settle down. Determined to clear her name, she joins a reality dating show—only for Oscar to abandon his work and chase after her, turning their rivalry into a whirlwind of romance and unexpected confessions.

items.title: Love Beyond the Script
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Lin Wu transmigrates into a novel as the doomed side character and uses her knowledge of the plot to win over heir Ning Sihan. Faced with the jealous fiancée, Shen Yuerou's schemes, she thwarts every attack and strikes back. As Sihan falls for her, Wu defies fate and seizes a new life for herself.

items.title: The Pregnancy Switcheroo
items.author: tinghuadao
items.abstract: What she doesn't expect is that when her child returns from summer camp, the boy standing before her isn't her son at all. Panicked, Irene rushes to the police for help, only to be shocked when she finds out that the police chief is her own husband, Rick Barlow.

items.title: Loved by Surprise
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Struggling artist Sophie Cotton takes a job at an exclusive club to pay tuition. After drunkenly kissing aloof heir Leon Sterling, she wakes in his villa, bound by a maid contract. Challenging Leon's control, their clash of pride sparks a hilarious, heartfelt romance as he falls for the girl who upended his life.

items.title: Unexpected Love in the 70s
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Amber Mercer, a famous young artist, time-traveled to the 1970s after being attacked. With her parents in trouble, they arranged a blind date to protect her. Amber reluctantly agreed, only to find her date was a principled, spirited man who made her feel like she had hit the jackpot.

items.title: Burning Hearts
items.author: yuewen
items.abstract: Seven years ago, Celia accidentally spent a night with the powerful CEO Henry, resulting in twin boys. One was stolen, leaving her with only little Lucas. Now back in town, in search of her lost son, she crosses paths with Henry again. Sparks fly, secrets unravel, and a family torn apart finds its way back together.

items.title: Wedding Trap
items.author: zhangwan
items.abstract: Luna was jilted at her engagement to Forrest and slandered as a "jinx". Seven years later, she married Felix and had a son. But one day Forrest returned and framed Luna for infidelity. He even forced her to kneel and apologize. But Felix appeared just in time to defuse the crisis.

items.title: Love Rewritten
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Given a second chance, Willa time-travels to the past, determinedly walking away from her cold husband Larry as she gathers proof of his affair with Rachel. Despite the sabotage from jealous colleagues and her scheming brother, she joins forces with Ethan and marries him. Together, they expose the cheaters and live in happiness.

items.title: Love Knows No Time
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: June Long found herself captivated by Liam Lee, but familial arrangements by their grandfathers pushed her into a marriage with Liam. However, the union turned out to be far from ideal, as Liam harbored a strong aversion toward June and remained indifferent even when she was on the brink of death. Confronted with the stark truth of their relationship, June bravely suggested a divorce. In the aftermath of their separation, Liam gradually came to the realization that his feelings for June had transformed into genuine love. Overwhelmed with regret, he embarked on a journey of self-discovery, employing various heartfelt gestures to prove his changed ways and win June back in a tale of redemption and pursuit.

items.title: Love’s Clandestine Waltz
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Colleen Byrd, neglected by her mother due to her preference for sons, is fortunate enough to continue her education thanks to Myron Bowman’s sponsorship. After graduating, Colleen chooses to enter the fast-paced world of sales, the quickest way to earn money. One fateful night, after a bout of drinking, Colleen and Myron have a one-night stand, igniting an uncontrollable passion between them that quickly spirals into a whirlwind affair.

items.title: Romance in Anatomy
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Joanna Sanders broke down. The man who had a one-night stand with her turned out to be her university professor. Given an ultimatum by Jeffery, she married him abruptly, with no prior arrangements, following his demand to either terminate the pregnancy or wed.

items.title: The Muse He Loves
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: On the eve of her engagement to Ethan, Emily is publicly rejected and left drowning—both in shame and literal waters—until a stormy encounter with Lucas sparks forbidden passion. As Lucas begins an unrelenting pursuit, Emily's heart drifts from Ethan's indifference. When Ethan awakens to regret, it's too late.

items.title: When Glory Returns, Love Is Lost
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Henry Preston is exiled after his mother's clan falls. Charlotte Fairmont marries his rival and takes Soulbreaker Poison to help him. Henry misunderstands her and treats her coldly. Charlotte dies with regret. Henry repents and prays for her. They reunite in a peach blossom grove, and their love transcends life and death.

items.title: When Love Rewrites Destiny
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After three years of a secret marriage to cold CEO Simon, Stella divorces him, shattered by terminal illness rumors and a fake pregnancy scandal. Rebuilding her life as an author, she ignites his pursuit—but refuses to relive the past. She gradually falls for William, a special forces officer whose devotion mends her heart.
